title: Sulfur
description: A NeoForge performance pack built for optimization. No QoL features, just a no stutter, high-FPS foundation.
body:
[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/neosulfur?logo=modrinth&color=28a745&labelColor=555555)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/everything-voxy) 
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Server-7289da?logo=discord&labelColor=555555)](https://discord.gg/D7U7J8H6Xb) [![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/Subscribe-FF0000?style=flat&logo=youtube&logoColor=white&labelColor=FF0000)](https://www.youtube.com/@GGWoofXD) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support_on_Ko--fi-13C3FF?style=flat&logo=kofi&logoColor=white&labelColor=13C3FF)](https://ko-fi.com/ggwoof) [![Twitch](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow_on_Twitch-9146FF?style=flat&logo=twitch&logoColor=white&labelColor=9146FF)](https://www.twitch.tv/ggwoofxd)

Sulfur: making your game run as fast, smooth, and stable as possible on the NeoForge loader. Every component in this pack is focused strictly on optimization, reducing stutter and improving resource handling, and keeping performance consistent in all situations.

The pack avoids unnecessary Quality of Life features, prioritizing instead the technical improvements that truly matter for responsiveness and frame stability. By stripping away the fluff, Sulfur significantly decreases memory usage while aggressively improving both FPS and TPS. It remains a lightweight and efficient foundation where every configuration is tuned so the game loads faster, runs smoother, and stays stable even in demanding environments.
